commit.message:
PPU: shorten line 0 after LCD enable from 456 to 454 dots

The hardware's WUVU/VENA phase offset on initial LCD enable shortens
the first scanline by 2 dots. A `first_line_after_lcd_on` flag on
VideoControl selects 454/450 constants for line-end and RUTU in
advance_dot(), clearing itself when the dot counter wraps.

Add image preview lightbox to menu editor

Thumbnails now show a zoom icon on hover and open a full-screen
lightbox overlay on click. Click the backdrop or X button to close.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: update tabs and activeTabId atomically to prevent empty state flash

Combined separate tabs and activeTabId useState calls into a single
state atom so both update in the same render. Previously, setActiveTabId
was called inside setTabs's updater function, which could cause an
intermediate render where the tab existed but activeTabId was stale,
showing the empty state instead of the file content.

commit.message:
Fix issues 6,7,9,12,20,25 across dashboard

- Issue 12: Add full address/contact edit fields to Pending orders (was In Transit only)
- Issue 20: Use form version counter so New Order form resets after submission
- Issue 25: Rename Failed → Cancelled in STATUS_LABELS, stat counters, and badge display; update email body copy
- Issue 9 (backend): Pass proof_photo from DB into notify_customer; embed photo inline in delivered email HTML; update email_service to accept/render proof_photo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: implement pix saas backend

Modules: auth, clients, pix-charges, audit-logs
Infrastructure: PrismaService (global), RedisService (global), QRCodeService

Auth:
- Register with bcrypt password hashing
- Login with Redis rate limiting (5 attempts / 15 min)
- JWT strategy with global JwtAuthGuard and @Public opt-out

Clients:
- Full CRUD with soft delete (deletedAt)
- Per-user ownership enforcement on every operation

PIX Charges:
- Charge creation with EMV/BACEN-spec payload (TLV + CRC-16)
- QR Code generation as base64 PNG data URL
- Status lifecycle: PENDING -> PAID | CANCELED | EXPIRED
- GET by id cached in Redis (5 min TTL, invalidated on mutation)
- Filtering by status and pagination on list

Audit Logs:
- All write actions recorded (register, login, create/update/delete client, create/cancel charge)
- Paginated read endpoint scoped to authenticated user

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: pre-commit secret scanning hook for autonomous agent safety

Three-layer defense against git leaks in autonomous operation:
1. Forbidden file patterns (.env, .pem, credentials.json, private keys)
2. Secret content patterns (API keys, tokens, passwords in staged diffs)
3. Autonomous allowlist — warns when agent commits touch unexpected paths

Hook lives in .githooks/ (committed, travels with repo). autonomous-sync.sh
sets AUTONOMOUS_AGENT env var and ensures core.hooksPath on every run.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add min_action_interval to trust model — trigger-agnostic temporal spacing

Decouples temporal spacing guarantee from cron. The trust budget gates
total actions; min_action_interval gates action rate. Both must pass.
Default 300s (5 min) → 20 credits drain in ≥100 minutes regardless of
triggering mechanism (cron, post-receive, filesystem watch, manual).

- ef1-trust-model.md: new parameter, enforcement ordering, trigger table
- autonomous-sync.sh: check_interval() after budget check, migration-safe
- schema.sql: v9 — min_action_interval column on trust_budget

commit.message:
feat: analytics, search, scheduler services + rate-limiter, feature-flags, tracking docs

New Services:
- analytics-service (port 3392): Privacy-first, self-hosted event tracking
  with φ-scaled rolling windows, LRU circular buffer, JSONL persistence
- search-service (port 3391): Hybrid full-text (TF-IDF) + vector (384-dim
  cosine) search with RRF ranking and CSL-gated filtering
- scheduler-service (port 3390): φ-scaled task scheduler with Fibonacci
  intervals, exponential backoff, webhook execution, jitter

New Shared Modules:
- rate-limiter.js: Sliding window with φ-scaled tiers (34/89/233 req/min),
  CSL-gated bypass for internal calls, auto-cleanup
- feature-flags.js: φ-scaled rollout (6.18% → 38.2% → 61.8% → 100%),
  deterministic hash assignment, CSL confidence gating, kill switches

Tracking Documents:
- CHANGES.md: Full changelog across all sessions
- GAPS_FOUND.md: Audit of remaining vs resolved gaps
- IMPROVEMENTS.md: All optimizations made

commit.message:
feat: add athlete self-log session — full multi-step wizard with coach view

Athletes can log their own practice sessions via a 4-step wizard:
1. Select event + optional focus of the day
2. Quick readiness check (sleep, soreness, energy)
3. Log drills — event-specific drill picker with reps, implement weight,
   and optional best distance. Add unlimited drill variations.
4. Post-session review — RPE, feeling, technique rating, mental focus,
   what went well, what needs improvement

Sessions appear in the athlete's My Sessions page with expandable detail
views showing all drill data, readiness scores, and feedback. Coaches
see all athlete-logged sessions via the new Athlete Logs page with
athlete and event filters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: PDF 우측 잘림 수정 + 사이드바 썸네일 엑박 제거 ■ Fix 1 — PDF 우측 잘림: PdfViewer를 ResizeObserver 기반으로 전면 재작성 - containerRef로 래퍼 div 실제 너비 추적 - → 항상 컨테이너를 정확히 채움 - 윈도우 리사이즈 / 사이드바 토글 시에도 자동 재계산 - 기존 Math.min(800, window.innerWidth-48) 고정값 방식 제거 ■ Fix 2 — 사이드바 썸네일 엑박: ArticleThumbnail 컴포넌트 신규 추가 - image_url / pdf_url 유효 여부 먼저 확인 - 이미지 있으면 표시 (onError로 실패 감지) - 이미지 없거나 로드 실패 시 → article_type별 아이콘 플레이스홀더 cover: ImageIcon / contents: AlignLeft / article: BookOpen - isActive 상태면 갈색 배경 + 흰색 아이콘으로 강조 - 카드 padding 12px→14px로 확장 Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6

commit.message:
Initial commit — NestScore multi-city building scoring app

Flutter app (iOS + Android) scoring 22,017 buildings across 4 Canadian cities
using public government data: violations, fire inspections, RentSafe evaluations,
and TSSA elevator data.

Cities: Toronto (14,496), Brampton (5,224), Montreal (1,933), Mississauga (364)

Includes:
- Flutter app with Riverpod, GoRouter, Google Maps, Firebase
- Python scrapers for all 4 cities + TSSA elevator data
- Building enrichment (Nominatim names + Street View photos)
- Firestore seeding script
- 15/15 unit tests passing

commit.message:
fix: 매거진 뷰어 긴급 버그 수정 + lookbook 디자인 전면 교체

■ Bug 1 수정 — 잘못된 PDF 표시:
  PdfViewer에 key={magazine.pdf_url || magazine.id} 추가
  → 매거진 간 이동 시 react-pdf Document 강제 재마운트
  → 이전 매거진 PDF 캐시 완전 제거

■ Bug 2 수정 — 기사 클릭 시 페이지 이동:
  handleArticleClick에서 setCurrentPage(article.page_start) 직접 호출
  (goTo 함수의 pageCount 의존성 우회 → PDF 로드 전/후 모두 동작)

■ Lookbook 디자인 전면 교체:
  - 배경: #F5F0EB (따뜻한 베이지) / 상단바: #FAF7F4
  - PDF 래퍼: box-shadow 3단계 (0 2px + 0 8px + 0 24px) → 책 테이블 위 느낌
  - 좌측 바인딩 선 효과 (gradient 오버레이)
  - 사이드바: #FAF7F4 + border #E8DDD4
  - 기사 카드: "HYUN · 3 pages" 형식 (저자 + 페이지 수)
  - cover/toc 소형 행 / article 카드 분리 구조 유지
  - 도트 인디케이터: 갈색 계열 (#8B7355)
  - 네비 버튼: 흰색 원형 + 그림자
  - 전체 텍스트 색상: 브라운 계열 (#2C1F14, #9C8B7A)

fix: add storageBucket to Firebase Admin init for image uploads

was not configured in the Admin SDK initialization. Now reads from
NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET env var.

notes, implement, distance, and event. Removed broken thumbnail
capture flow — the metadata itself is the finding mechanism.

style: use KeyRound icon in No Key Selected view

Match the icon style with sidebar for consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf(discoveries): Rhodes fallback to avoid computing ALL identities

Bare /api/discoveries (no /c/ prefix) bypasses CommunityMiddleware,
leaving community=None. This caused _compute_discoveries to process
ALL 700+ identities instead of just the ~500 Rhodes ones. Now falls
back to Rhodes community for the early-filter optimization.

commit.message:
perf(discoveries): filter by community BEFORE batch neighbor computation

The _compute_discoveries function was computing neighbors for ALL 700+
unreviewed identities before filtering by community. For Fox Family with
~100 identities, this caused 30+ second server timeouts. Now filters
unreviewed and confirmed lists by community_identity_ids before the
expensive batch_best_neighbor_distances call.

fix: switch image generation to Gemini 3.1 Flash (Nano Banana 2)

Replace broken Imagen 3 predict endpoint with gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview
native image generation. Imagen 3 was discontinued and unavailable via the
Generative Language API. Nano Banana 2 supports direct image generation
via generateContent with responseModalities: ['TEXT', 'IMAGE'].

Preload system, compressed cache, keyboard nav, UI improvements

- Add Preload Hours (all 49 fhours for current field) and Preload All
  (all fields × all hours) with live progress, parallelized via rayon
- Compress cached frames with flate2 deflate (~10x RAM reduction,
  full 3675-frame preload fits in ~3 GB instead of 84 GB)
- Arrow keys: up/down navigates fields, left/right steps forecast hours
- Animation persists when switching variables (no longer stops on click)
- Fix run picker: include previous hour (was skipping due to off-by-one)
- Default animation range expanded from f00-f18 to f00-f48
- Cache limit raised to 4000 frames
- HTTP client: connection pool 50/host, timeout 20s (was 60s)
